items.title: Design and implement ICT training for people with disabilities
items.subject: software_data, formation, rnd_ia, communication
items.evidenceExcerpt: REPUBLIC OF MOZAMBIQUE MINISTRY OF COMMUNICATIONS AND DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION MOZAMBIQUE DIGITAL ACCELERATION PROJECTS REQUEST FOR EXPRESSIONS OF INTEREST CONSULTING FIRMS DESIGN AND IMPLEMENT ICT TRAINING FOR PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES PROJECT ID: P176459 Reference No.: N118/MDAP/MCTD/QCBS-CS/25 (Re-advertisement) 1. The Government of Mozambique, through the Ministry of Communications and Digital Transformation (MCTD), has received financing from the World Bank for the implementation of the Mozambique Digital Acceleration Project (MDAP), and intends to apply part of the funds to hire a firm to provide Training for Persons with Visual Impairments (Blind and Low Vision) in Mozambique on the Use of Information and Communication Technologies (ICTs). 2. The consultancy services (“the Services”) are intended, in the first phase, to train 847 persons with visual impairments (blind and low vision)

items.evidenceExcerpt: REQUEST FOR EXPRESSIONS OF INTEREST SAINT LUCIA Assignment Title: Consultancy to Support the Central Statistics Office to Institutionalise Strategic Communication of Official Statistics (Technical Assistance for CSO website upgrade, strategic communications, and outreach to support official statistics) Reference No.: SLU-DDM-TACOMM-CQS-26 The Government of Saint Lucia has received financing from the World Bank toward the cost of the OECS Data for Decision Making Project and intends to apply part of the proceeds for consulting services. The consulting services (“the Services”) are intended to support the Central Statistics Office (CSO) to institutionalise strategic communication of official statistics and to modernise the CSO website. The assignment will support the CSO’s strategic advocacy and communication endeavour to promote the availability of and access to its statistical products a

The Central Project Coordination Unit of the Ministry of Finance and Economic Affairs now invites sealed Proposals from eligible Proposers for a Comprehensive Higher Education Management Information System (HEMIS). 3. items.evidenceExcerpt: Specific Procurement Notice Request for Bids Goods (One-Envelope Bidding Process) Country: Kenya Name of Project: Kenya Digital Economy Acceleration Project Contract Title: Supply, Delivery, Installation and Commissioning of Virtual Laboratory (VR) Equipment for Simulation-Based Training in TVETs Institutions Loan No./Credit No./ Grant No.: 7289-KE and 7290-KE RFB Reference No.: KE-ICTA-553315-GO-RFB 1.
